message:
feat(freeze): Add put_private_field opcode Zig support

Convert put_private_field opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode sets a private field value on an object.

Stack effect: [obj, name, val] -> [] (pops 3)

Implementation:
- Pops val, name, and obj from stack
- Calls JS_FrozenSetPrivateField helper function
- Frees obj and name references (val is transferred to object)
- Returns exception if operation fails
- In Zig: uses block expressions for POP
- In C: uses POP() macro and FROZEN_FREE
